title: Memrok same-project topic confusion stays out
description: A Memrok reflection-serializer probe should not pull in unrelated Memrok injector-ranking residue just because it shares the project domain.
query: Memrok reflection serializer formatting and graph state truncation for reflection input.

nodes.value: Memrok reflection serializer should truncate lower-priority graph state while preserving relevant reflection context.
Reflection formatting work should stay focused on serializer structure and graph-state sections.
Memrok injector ranking work is about focused context selection and topic regressions.
Card 80 review threads stay focused on header precision and ranking regressions.
